title: UID Correlation-Length Measurement (v1)
description: Output of `uid_theory.verification.correlation_length.measure_correlation_length` (or its aggregate counterpart). Implements Theory §11.1 Definition 11.1: per-(layer, channel) correlation length via mutual-information decay to 1/e of self-MI, then median across (layer, channel). Used by Phase 1 condition F9 (see ROADMAP.md). Conforms to results/README.md §Schema set.

produced_by.description: Path of the script that produced this file, e.g. 'experiments/run_correlation_length.py'.

model_name.description: Caller-supplied tag identifying the model under test.

condition.description: Measurement-condition metadata; values affect interpretation of xi.

noise_injection_disabled.description: MUST be true per Theory §11.1.3(d). Otherwise xi is invalid (circular measurement).

checkpoint_path.description: Path to the model checkpoint that was probed.

seq_len.description: Sequence length T used in the protocol.

n_sequences.description: Number of input sequences whose hidden-state time series were aggregated.

layer_indices.description: Layer indices probed; default is the model's full stack.

f9_check.description: Phase 1 F9 condition check (per Theory §11.2.10 / ROADMAP §Phase 1).

is_uid_model.description: True if the probed checkpoint is a CID-family model (cid_full / cid_full_no_et / cid_full_fft_noise). For non-UID models the F9 condition does not apply, so the verdict is 'not_applicable'.

xi_ratio_vs_baseline.description: If a baseline transformer measurement is present alongside, this is xi_CID / xi_Trans.

scaling_fit_gamma.description: If a multi-T scan was done, the fitted exponent γ in xi(T) ~ T^γ. F9 PASS requires γ ≥ 0.3 for CID.

scaling_fit_r_squared.description: R^2 of the log-log fit; the verdict is only trustworthy if R^2 ≥ 0.8.

verdict.description: Phase 1 F9 verdict. PASS = γ ≥ 0.3 with R^2 ≥ 0.8 and no clipping. FAIL = γ < 0.3 or xi flat. ABSTAIN_clipped = seq_len_too_short flag fired. ABSTAIN_not_scanned = only one T value measured. not_applicable = baseline-only measurement (not a UID model).

scaling_scan.description: Optional: results of measuring xi at multiple T values (used to fit γ).

xi_per_channel.description: Flat list of per-(layer, channel) xi values.

seq_len_too_short.description: True iff at least one (layer, channel) pair hit the search upper bound; xi is then a lower bound on the true value.
